headline: NSG Bio and Charles River Sign Memorandum of Understanding to Strengthen Support for Biotech Innovation in Singapore
summary: NSG Bio announced the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Charles River Laboratories ("Charles River"), marking a new collaboration aimed at strengthening support for biotech companies building and scaling in Singapore. The MOU was signed during Charles River's APAC Biomanufacturing Leadership Summit 2026, reflecting a shared commitment to accelerating innovation through stronger connections across the life sciences value chain.
